title: LogicLab
description: A comprehensive full-stack coding platform featuring an online judge system. Built with secure user authentication and problem management workflows.
details: Built a full-stack coding platform supporting problem solving, submission evaluation, and user authentication.
Designed RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express for handling problem submissions, user management, and evaluation workflows.
Structured MongoDB schema to efficiently manage problems, users, and submissions for scalable data access.
Integrated Redis caching to optimize frequently accessed data and reduce database load.
Implemented secure authentication and role-based access control using JWT and middleware.
Developed responsive frontend using React hooks for efficient state and UI management.

title: Swigito
description: An object-oriented backend design for a food delivery system simulating core workflows and scalable restaurant discovery.
details: Architected a scalable backend system simulating core food delivery workflows including restaurant discovery, cart handling, and order processing.
Applied design patterns (Strategy, Factory, Singleton) to decouple components and enable extensible system behavior.
Designed flexible abstractions for multiple order types and pluggable modules, allowing easy addition of new features without modifying core logic.
Structured the codebase into layered components (models, managers, services) to improve maintainability and separation of concerns.

title: Dialysis Monitor
description: A real-time medical dashboard tracking patient vitals with anomaly detection for effective health monitoring.
details: Developed a real-time data visualization dashboard for complex medical hardware monitors.
Integrated smart anomaly detection algorithms to alert medical staff of critical patient health metrics.
Utilized WebSockets for low-latency bi-directional communication between the server and hardware simulation.

title: LLD Mini Projects
description: A collection of Low-Level Design (LLD) implementations for common system design problems and OOP challenges.
details: Implemented standard LLD problems like Parking Lot, Tic-Tac-Toe, and Snake & Ladder with robust OOP architecture.
Focused on SOLID principles and clean code practices for maintainable software modules.

title: StoodoMart
description: A student-centric marketplace application for listings and peer-to-peer item management.
details: Designed an intuitive mobile interface for peer-to-peer student commerce.
Integrated Firebase for real-time database updates and user authentication.
Implemented a secure category-based search and filter system for product listings.
